name: The Void Rift
narrative: Reality tears open before you, revealing a wound in the fabric of existence. Through the rift, you glimpse impossible geometries and colors that have no name. Something on the other side sees you too — and reaches out with an offering.

choices.label: Reach through
choices.description: Accept the offering from beyond. Gain immense power at terrible cost.

outcome.description: Your hand passes through the rift and returns clutching something that shouldn't exist. Your mind reels from the contact.

choices.label: Seal the rift
choices.description: Pour your life force into closing the wound. Sacrifice 12 HP to prevent catastrophe.

outcome.description: The rift screams as it collapses. Reality stabilizes, and the residual energy hardens into gold around your feet.

choices.label: Step through
choices.description: Enter the void entirely. You may not return as you were.

outcome.description: The void reshapes you. You emerge somewhere else entirely, changed in ways you can't articulate.

name: The Corpse of a God
narrative: You stand in the ribcage of something divine. Bones the size of towers arch overhead, still radiating fading warmth. The god's heart — a crystallized sphere of pure energy — rests in a crater at the center, cracked but pulsing. Worshippers would kill for a fragment. You could take the whole thing.

choices.label: Take the heart
choices.description: Claim the divine heart. Its power is beyond mortal comprehension.

outcome.description: The heart sears your hands as you lift it. Divine energy rewrites your very being — but mortality strains under the weight.

choices.label: Harvest fragments
choices.description: Chip away pieces of the heart. Safer, but less rewarding.

outcome.description: Each fragment hums with residual divinity. Merchants and scholars would pay fortunes for these.

choices.label: Pray to the remains
choices.description: Kneel before the dead god and offer reverence. Perhaps death is not the end for divinity.

outcome.description: A whisper echoes from nowhere: 'You are seen.' Knowledge floods your mind — the path ahead is laid bare.

name: The Soul Forge
narrative: This is no ordinary forge. Ghostly chains dangle from the ceiling, each binding a wailing spirit above a crucible of liquid starlight. A sign carved in ancient script reads: 'Feed the forge what you are. Receive what you could become.'

choices.label: Sacrifice HP for power
choices.description: Offer 15 HP to the forge. It will reshape your potential.

outcome.description: Your essence burns in the crucible. What emerges is sharper, deadlier, and forged in suffering.

choices.label: Sacrifice gold for resilience
choices.description: Pour 60 gold into the crucible. The forge will temper your body.

outcome.description: Liquid starlight washes over you. Your body feels like iron, your wounds knitting closed.

choices.label: Free the spirits
choices.description: Shatter the chains and release the trapped souls. The forge will go dark.

outcome.description: The spirits scatter into light, each one pressing a grateful gift into your hands as they vanish.

name: The Echo Chamber
narrative: You enter a vast spherical chamber where sound behaves impossibly. Your footsteps arrive before you take them. Your voice answers questions you haven't asked. At the center, a temporal anomaly swirls — a window to moments yet to come and long since passed.

choices.label: Glimpse the future
choices.description: Look through the anomaly to see what awaits. Knowledge is power.

outcome.description: You witness the horrors ahead. The knowledge is invaluable — but the visions leave scars on your psyche.

choices.label: Reach into the past
choices.description: Pull something from a time when heroes still walked these halls.

outcome.description: Your hand closes around a weapon from an age of legends. It feels impossibly light and impossibly sharp.

choices.label: Collapse the anomaly
choices.description: Overload the temporal rift. The resulting explosion might catapult you forward.

outcome.description: Time shatters around you. When you regain your senses, the dungeon around you is different. You've jumped ahead.

name: The Throne of Chains
narrative: A throne of black iron sits atop a dais, draped in chains that writhe like living things. The previous occupant is a desiccated husk slumped to one side. The throne whispers promises of dominion — if you dare sit.

choices.label: Sit on the throne
choices.description: Claim the throne's power. The chains will bind you, but the strength is immense.

outcome.description: Chains lash around your limbs as dark energy surges through you. When they release, you are more and less than you were.

choices.label: Loot the previous king
choices.description: Search the desiccated corpse. Whatever killed them left their possessions intact.

outcome.description: The husk crumbles at your touch, revealing a crown of dark gold and a pouch heavy with coin.

choices.label: Destroy the throne
choices.description: Shatter the throne and break its cycle of corruption. A selfless act — but not without reward.

outcome.description: The chains scream as the throne splinters. Purified energy washes through the chamber, mending your wounds and cleansing your deck.

name: The Eldritch Merchant
narrative: A figure with too many arms and a face that shifts like oil on water materializes from the shadows. "I deal in absolutes," it says, each word arriving from a different direction. "Health for power. Power for health. Or everything for everything." It gestures to three floating orbs.

choices.label: Health for power
choices.description: Sacrifice 20 max HP. Receive the merchant's finest wares.

outcome.description: Your body withers as the merchant's orb descends into your hands. Inside: weapons of impossible craft.

choices.label: Power for health
choices.description: Surrender your strongest card. The merchant restores you completely.

outcome.description: The merchant plucks something from your deck with a satisfied hiss. In return, vitality floods through you.

choices.label: Everything for everything
choices.description: Pay 50 gold and 10 HP. Receive a complete transformation.

outcome.description: The merchant laughs — a sound like breaking glass. Pain and fortune wash over you in equal measure.

name: The Memory Pool
narrative: A pool of liquid silver fills a cavern untouched by corruption. Images flicker across its surface — battles fought, allies lost, paths not taken. The pool offers to let you shed what holds you back, or reclaim what you've lost. But every exchange demands balance.

choices.label: Shed weakness
choices.description: Let the pool dissolve your weakest cards. Remove two cards from your deck.

outcome.description: You plunge your hands into the silver. Memories of failure dissolve — and with them, the dead weight in your deck.

choices.label: Reclaim vitality
choices.description: Submerge yourself and let the pool restore what the dungeon has taken.

outcome.description: The silver closes over your head. When you surface, every wound is gone and your body feels renewed.

choices.label: Drink the pool dry
choices.description: Consume every drop. The power will be overwhelming — and so will the consequence.

outcome.description: Raw memory floods your mind. You gain everything the pool held — but your body buckles under the strain.

name: The Final Altar
narrative: At the edge of oblivion stands an altar carved from a single slab of obsidian. Three grooves are cut into its surface — one shaped like a coin, one like a drop of blood, and one like a human heart. The inscription reads: 'The last offering determines the ending.'

choices.label: Offer gold
choices.description: Place 80 gold on the altar. Wealth buys passage even here.

outcome.description: The gold melts into the groove and the altar hums. A cache of powerful equipment materializes before you.

choices.label: Offer blood
choices.description: Sacrifice 18 HP. Pain is the oldest currency.

outcome.description: Your blood fills the groove and ignites. The altar grants you techniques born from suffering.

choices.label: Offer nothing
choices.description: Refuse the altar. Walk past it with what you have. You are enough.

outcome.description: The altar falls silent. Nothing happens — but you feel a quiet certainty settle in your bones. You are ready.
